properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When my dreams are all shattered And my hope is all gone And it seems there's no reason to go on Sometimes I cry and even ask why When there are things that I don't understand

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: But when it's all said and done Jesus is the One And He knows what's best for me Then I'm reminded and Oh! It's so plain That my trials are just growing pains

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Growing pains God could spare me give me sunshine no rain But I'd never grow up I'd just stay the same So I know that my trials are just gowing pains

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: So when your dreams are all shattered And your hope is all gone And it seems there's no reason to go on Go ahead and cry you can even ask why When there are things that you don't understand

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: But when it's all said and done Jesus is the One And He knows what's best for you You'll be reminded and twill be so plain That your trials are just growing pains

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Growing pains God could spare you give you sunshine no rain But you'd never grow up You'd just stay the same So know that your trials are just growing pains

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Growing pains God could spare me give me sunshine no rain But I'd never grow up I'd just stay the same So I know that my trials are just growing pains
